description.value: Mods are used to improve the statistics of clothing and weapons.
Pick blueprint from list and craft item using [UI APPLY]
Upgrading increases quality of an item. Select item from the list and upgrade using [UI_Apply]

To craft an item you need crafting materials. List of all needed materials is displayed on the right side. You can get crafting materials by looting and disassembling items. You can also buy them in shops

To upgrade an item you need crafting materials. List of all needed materials is displayed on the right side. You can get crafting materials by looting and disassembling items. You can also buy them in shops
The cyberware upgrades are limited by the amount of points spent on attributes to which the cyberware part is related.
Clothing don't give you any additional protection. You need to buy armor cyberware from ripperdocs.
